name: DJ Luke Eargoggle -ElectroрҹӨ–SГёndagвқӨпёҸвҖҚрҹ”ҘрҹҺ¶рҹҢһрҹ‘Қ
description:
Den levende legenden LUKE EARGOGGLE er i by'n, og avslutter denne gangen sitt OslobesГёk pГҘ MIR etter en helg pГҘ The Villa.

Denne svensken er i verdensklasse og en elektronika musiker alle elekto DJs verden over vet om.
Bedre blir det ikke!!!

INFO -->  (EN) :
Luke Eargoggle (Lukas Pettersson) is a prominent Swedish electro producer and DJ based in Gothenburg, known for shaping the European electro-funk scene over the last two decades. He runs the label Stilleben RecordsвҖ”which has over 120 releasesвҖ”and is recognized for his synthetic, minimalist sound, often featuring robotic vocals and deep, futuristic grooves.
His music is heavily influenced by Kraftwerk, Dopplereffekt, and early electro-funk, producing what is often described as "electro with a soul" or "urban decay" funk.
